Anchor Screener Guide

Objects included in the Anchor Deal Screener (data, views, and visualizations).

1. Portfolio

  1. Anchor Loans Closed Deals
  2. Anchor Sum of Peak UPB
  3. Progress Owned Homes (within 10 miles)

2. Location

  1. Pretium HBF Market Score
  2. School District Rank
  3. Crime Rating Range
  4. Major Retailers

3. Demographics

  1. Population
  2. Median HH Income
  3. Top 3 Industries by Employer
  4. Employment
  5. Unemployment

4. Housing Market Product Type

  1. Median Sale Price
  2. Months of Supply
  3. Median Days on Market
  4. # of Builders within 5 miles

5. Maps & Charts

5.1 Major Retailers Map

  1. Within 1 mile
  2. Within 3 miles
  3. Within 5 miles

5.2 Comps (Zonda)

  1. X = Unit Square Footage
  2. Y = Median Sale Price
  3. Color = Builder

5.3 Annual Observed Starts vs. Annual Observed Closings Line Chart

5.4 School Score by Zip Code Map

5.5 Crime Score by Zip Code Map

Generated from Jinja template. Source: scripts/anchor/build_screener_guide_pdf.py
